description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in a fitted tactical jumpsuit with long sleeves and full-length pants. The suit features utility belts and holsters on both thighs, as well as wrist guards and gloves, suggesting a combat or security role. The figure has shoulder-length, wavy hair and a determined facial expression. Accessories include a detailed belt with pouches and what appear to be holstered weapons or tools on each side. The boots are sturdy and designed for mobility, while the gloves and wrist guards add to the utilitarian appearance. The overall look is sleek, professional, and ready for action in an urban environment.
description: A female adult in a tactical jumpsuit with utility belts, holsters, gloves, and wrist guards, exuding a professional and action-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tactical suit, facial features, utility belt, holsters, gloves, and wrist guards.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the holsters, belt, and the figure's posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jumpsuit, hair, and the symmetrical placement of holsters and belt accessories.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the holsters, belt, and wrist guards.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted tactical jumpsuit with utility belt, holsters, gloves, and wrist guards
